description: Per-minute differential carrier-phase TEC between frequency pairs for the same station. Removes common-mode clock/geometry errors; residual isolates dispersive ionospheric component and scintillation.

fields.name: minute_boundary
fields.description: Unix epoch timestamp of minute boundary

fields.name: rms_diff_tecu
fields.description: RMS of dTEC_f1 - dTEC_f2 over the minute. Near-zero for stable ionosphere; elevated during scintillation or mode changes.

fields.name: mean_diff_tecu
fields.description: Mean of dTEC_f1 - dTEC_f2. Non-zero offset indicates inter-frequency bias or unresolved phase ambiguity.

fields.name: n_points
fields.description: Number of interpolated time points in the common overlap window

fields.name: quality_flag
fields.description: Quality flag based on n_points and rms_diff_tecu
